title: grewia hookeriana
intro: Grewia hookeriana, also known as the Hooker's cluster fig, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and aiding in the treatment of various skin conditions. Grewia hookeriana can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or poultice, and is often used in Ayurvedic and traditional Chinese medicine.
